Kitae Kim Busan.name: Kitae Kim Busan

path.name: Despair Fury
path.description: Despair Fury — a storm of rage that breaks the soul before the body.

mastery.description: Overwhelming raw strength mastery — no technique needed when power is absolute.

unique_skill.name: Busan Beast
unique_skill.description: From the streets of Busan, he carries a fury that cannot be trained away.

Kitae Kim Busan.default_dialogue: You think you can handle me? You don't know what I've been through.
Kitae Kim Busan.unique_path_dialogue: Despair Fury — everything I've suppressed, unleashed.
Kitae Kim Busan.unique_skill_dialogue: Busan raised me. This is what it made.

moves.name: Slam
moves.dialogue: I'll drive you into the ground.

moves.name: Knee Strike
moves.miss_dialogue: You created distance just in time.

moves.name: Focus Punch
moves.dialogue: Every bit of strength behind this.

moves.name: Torque Punch
moves.dialogue: This is where Despair Fury ends everything.
moves.crit_dialogue: The rotational power obliterates all defense!

moves.name: Despair Block
moves.dialogue: You can't hurt what's already been through despair.

Kitae Kim Cheongliang.name: Kitae Kim Cheongliang

path.name: Despair Fury
path.description: Cheongliang's Despair Fury is colder — calculated rage, not blind fury.

mastery.description: Mastery of Strength forged through surviving the Cheongliang hierarchy.

unique_skill.name: Cheongliang Iron Will
unique_skill.description: He climbed Cheongliang not with talent — with absolute refusal to lose.

Kitae Kim Cheongliang.default_dialogue: Cheongliang made me this way. Thank them.
Kitae Kim Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Iron Will. You don't break what was already broken and rebuilt.

moves.name: Knee Strike
moves.dialogue: This is what Cheongliang taught me.

moves.name: Focus Punch
moves.dialogue: Every ounce of will behind this.
moves.crit_dialogue: Iron Will channeled into a single blow!

moves.name: Despair Fury Strike
moves.crit_dialogue: Despair Fury tears through all resistance!

James Lee Mastermind.name: James Lee Mastermind

path.name: Mastermind
path.description: The Mastermind sees every outcome before it happens — he fights the conclusion, not the fight.

mastery.description: Mastermind-level Speed mastery — every step placed with purpose at maximum velocity.

unique_skill.name: God of IA
unique_skill.description: IA Kick. IA Punch. Repeated until you can't stand. That's James Lee.

James Lee Mastermind.default_dialogue: I've already seen how this ends.
James Lee Mastermind.unique_path_dialogue: The Mastermind path — I don't react. I decide.
James Lee Mastermind.unique_skill_dialogue: IA. Again. Again. You'll break before I slow down.

moves.name: IA Kick
moves.dialogue: First one. There will be more.

moves.name: Kick Barrage
moves.dialogue: One. Two. Three. You won't count them all.

moves.name: Consecutive IA
moves.dialogue: IA. IA. IA. It doesn't stop until you do.
moves.crit_dialogue: Consecutive IA — the signature of the Mastermind at full power!

moves.name: Mastermind Parry
moves.dialogue: I predicted that three moves ago.

James Lee Peak.name: James Lee Peak

path.name: Peak Human
path.description: Peak Human — the ceiling other fighters look up at and call a wall.

mastery.description: Peak-level Speed mastery — every movement a statement of what human limits truly are.

unique_skill.name: Peak Execution
unique_skill.description: At peak, there is no wasted motion. No wasted breath. Only victory.

James Lee Peak.default_dialogue: This is what peak looks like. Study it.
James Lee Peak.unique_path_dialogue: Peak Human — I am the limit.
James Lee Peak.unique_skill_dialogue: Peak Execution. No openings. No mistakes.

moves.name: Flip Kick
moves.crit_dialogue: The form is perfect from every angle!

moves.name: Spin Kick
moves.dialogue: At peak rotation, this is a wall.

moves.name: Handstand Kick
moves.dialogue: At peak, even this is lethal.

moves.name: Kick Barrage
moves.dialogue: At peak speed — good luck counting.

moves.name: Human Limit Break
moves.dialogue: This is where human potential ends and legend begins.
moves.crit_dialogue: Beyond the limit — James Lee at absolute peak!
moves.miss_dialogue: Even the peak can be endured.

moves.name: Peak Reflex
moves.dialogue: At peak, defense is offense waiting.

Diego Kang.name: Diego Kang

path.name: K-Star Dominance
path.description: K-Star Dominance — celebrity status backed by combat that would end careers.

mastery.description: Speed mastery refined through years of disciplined peak-performance training.

unique_skill.name: Star Power
unique_skill.description: The cameras don't show how dangerous he really is.

Diego Kang.default_dialogue: Don't confuse the fame for weakness.
Diego Kang.unique_path_dialogue: K-Star Dominance — the stage is the battlefield.
Diego Kang.unique_skill_dialogue: Star Power activated. You won't see this coming.

moves.name: IA Kick
moves.crit_dialogue: A strike worthy of the spotlight!

moves.name: Kick Barrage
moves.crit_dialogue: Every hit lands in perfect sequence!

moves.name: K-Star Finale
moves.crit_dialogue: Diego Kang delivers the finishing performance!

James Lee 3T.name: James Lee 3T

path.name: 3-Talent Rising
path.description: 3-Talent Rising — three gifts developing at once. The potential is already frightening.

mastery.description: Speed mastery emerging naturally — his footwork at 3T already outpaces trained fighters.

unique_skill.name: Triple Threat
unique_skill.description: Three talents, one fighter. He hasn't even peaked yet.

James Lee 3T.default_dialogue: I'm still learning. That should scare you.
James Lee 3T.unique_path_dialogue: 3-Talent Rising — I'm not there yet. But I'm close.
James Lee 3T.unique_skill_dialogue: Triple Threat — three gifts, one moment.

moves.name: Triple Unleash
moves.crit_dialogue: 3T James Lee shows why the future belongs to him!
moves.miss_dialogue: The potential was there — timing wasn't.

moves.name: Instinct Block
moves.dialogue: I don't know why I moved there. It worked.

James Lee 2T.name: James Lee 2T

path.name: 2-Talent Awakening
path.description: 2-Talent Awakening — two gifts discovered. The journey to the top has begun.

mastery.description: Early Speed mastery — fast enough to surprise fighters who've trained for years.

unique_skill.name: Double Awakening
unique_skill.description: Two talents unlocked. The third is coming.

James Lee 2T.default_dialogue: Two talents aren't enough for you? Watch me prove you wrong.
James Lee 2T.unique_path_dialogue: 2-Talent Awakening — two gifts, one path forward.
James Lee 2T.unique_skill_dialogue: Double Awakening — both talents firing at once.

moves.name: IA Punch
moves.crit_dialogue: Natural speed closes the gap instantly!

moves.name: Spin Kick
moves.dialogue: Two talents make this hit harder.

moves.name: Handstand Kick
moves.crit_dialogue: The awakening shows — raw and explosive!

moves.name: Double Talent Finish
moves.crit_dialogue: Both talents firing at once — the future is here!

Seonji Yuk 3T.name: Seonji Yuk 3T

path.name: Ssirium Warrior
path.description: Ssirium Warrior — traditional wrestling elevated to a new level of lethality.

mastery.description: Strength and Speed mastery from years of Ssirium discipline.

unique_skill.name: Ssirium Dominance
unique_skill.description: Traditional Ssirium turned into something the art never anticipated.

Seonji Yuk 3T.default_dialogue: Ssirium is not just a sport. It's a weapon.
Seonji Yuk 3T.unique_path_dialogue: Ssirium Warrior — I don't fight. I dismantle.
Seonji Yuk 3T.unique_skill_dialogue: Ssirium Dominance — you're already on the ground. You just don't know it.

moves.name: Heavy Kick
moves.crit_dialogue: The weight behind that kick is devastating!

moves.name: Spear
moves.crit_dialogue: Spear tackle lands with full momentum!

moves.name: Ssirium Slam
moves.dialogue: This is what Ssirium was made for.

moves.name: Consecutive Blows
moves.dialogue: One after another. No breathing room.

moves.name: Ssirium Throw
moves.crit_dialogue: The throw sends them crashing down!

Seonji Yuk 2T.name: Seonji Yuk 2T

path.name: Ssirium Rising
path.description: Ssirium Rising — the traditional art finding its true form in combat.

mastery.description: Strength and Endurance mastery rooted in Ssirium foundation.

unique_skill.name: Ssirium Foundation
unique_skill.description: The fundamentals are stronger than most fighters' finishing moves.

Seonji Yuk 2T.default_dialogue: My base is stronger than your best.
Seonji Yuk 2T.unique_path_dialogue: Ssirium Rising — the old ways don't break.
Seonji Yuk 2T.unique_skill_dialogue: Ssirium Foundation — built on something you can't copy.

moves.name: Ssirium Throw
moves.miss_dialogue: You escaped at the last second.

Beolgu Lee Cheongliang.name: Beolgu Lee Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Brawler
path.description: Cheongliang Brawler — forged in the streets, tested in the school.

mastery.description: Raw Strength mastery from Cheongliang street fights.

unique_skill.name: Street Toughness
unique_skill.description: He didn't train in a gym. He trained in survival.

Beolgu Lee Cheongliang.default_dialogue: You don't know what Cheongliang does to a person.
Beolgu Lee Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Cheongliang Brawler — I've been hit harder than this my whole life.
Beolgu Lee Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Street Toughness — I don't stop. That's the only skill I needed.

moves.name: Focus Punch
moves.miss_dialogue: The focus broke at the last second.

moves.name: Knee Strike
moves.miss_dialogue: You created space just in time.

moves.name: Cheongliang Guard
moves.dialogue: Cheongliang taught me to take hits.

Gwang Yo Cheongliang.name: Gwang Yo Cheongliang

path.name: MMA Circuit
path.description: MMA Circuit — speed and grappling blended into something dangerous.

mastery.description: Speed mastery honed through MMA training.

unique_skill.name: Lock & Strike
unique_skill.description: He controls the range and punishes every mistake.

Gwang Yo Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: MMA Circuit — I trained for real fights, not exhibitions.
Gwang Yo Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Lock & Strike — I control where this goes.

moves.name: Punch
moves.crit_dialogue: Speed makes this hit twice as hard!

moves.name: MMA Strikes
moves.dialogue: This is what I trained for.

moves.name: MMA Shell
moves.dialogue: MMA defense is built for this.

Jaesu Noh Cheongliang.name: Jaesu Noh Cheongliang

path.name: Endurance Fighter
path.description: Endurance Fighter — he takes the hits and keeps coming.

mastery.description: Endurance mastery — built to outlast everyone in the room.

unique_skill.name: Iron Body
unique_skill.description: The hits don't stop him. They fuel him.

Jaesu Noh Cheongliang.default_dialogue: Hit me harder. I need the warm-up.
Jaesu Noh Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Endurance Fighter — I don't dodge. I outlast.
Jaesu Noh Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Iron Body — keep swinging. I'll still be standing.

moves.name: Headbutt
moves.dialogue: I don't care if it hurts me too.
moves.crit_dialogue: Headbutt lands — both hurt, but you more!

moves.name: Force Punch
moves.dialogue: Every bit of endurance turned into force.

moves.name: Iron Stance
moves.dialogue: I've been hit worse. Keep going.

Kojima Brothers Cheongliang.name: Kojima Brothers Cheongliang

path.name: Tag Team Tactics
path.description: Tag Team Tactics — synchronized combat that overwhelms any solo fighter.

mastery.description: Strength and Endurance mastery forged in synchronized combat.

unique_skill.name: Brother's Combo
unique_skill.description: You can't block what comes from two directions at once.

Kojima Brothers Cheongliang.default_dialogue: You think you can fight both of us?
Kojima Brothers Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Tag Team Tactics — two minds, one goal.
Kojima Brothers Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Brother's Combo — together we hit twice as hard.

moves.name: Punch
moves.dialogue: One of us hits. Then the other.

moves.name: Kick
moves.crit_dialogue: The angle was impossible to cover!

moves.name: Headbutt
moves.crit_dialogue: Direct headbutt while guard is split!
moves.miss_dialogue: You turned at the right moment.

moves.name: Side Slam
moves.crit_dialogue: Tag team finishing slam — nowhere to go!

moves.name: Tag Cover
moves.dialogue: One of us always has the other's back.

Shamen Guards Cheongliang.name: Shamen Guards Cheongliang

path.name: Guard Duty
path.description: Guard Duty — they're not here to win. They're here to not lose quickly.

mastery.description: No mastery — just showing up.

unique_skill.name: Numbers Game
unique_skill.description: There's more of us. That counts for something.

Shamen Guards Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Guard Duty — we hold the line.
Shamen Guards Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Numbers Game — you can't get all of us.

moves.name: Front Kick
moves.crit_dialogue: Guard puts everything in one kick!

Yakuza Guard Cheongliang.name: Yakuza Guard Cheongliang

path.name: Yakuza Loyalty
path.description: Yakuza Loyalty — fight for the family. Fall for the family.

mastery.description: No mastery — loyalty doesn't come with combat expertise.

unique_skill.name: Yakuza Backup
unique_skill.description: Someone is always behind you in the yakuza. Always.

Yakuza Guard Cheongliang.default_dialogue: I'm loyal to the family. That's enough.
Yakuza Guard Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Yakuza Loyalty — I serve, I fight, I fall if I must.
Yakuza Guard Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Yakuza Backup — you thought you only had to deal with me?

moves.name: Regular Hit
moves.dialogue: This is the best I've got.

moves.name: Side Kick
moves.dialogue: I give everything I have — which isn't much.

Taebong Lim Cheongliang.name: Taebong Lim Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Streets
path.description: Cheongliang Streets — born into the chaos, fighting to survive it.

mastery.description: No mastery — raw street survival.

unique_skill.name: Stubborn Will
unique_skill.description: He doesn't know when to quit. That alone makes him dangerous.

Taebong Lim Cheongliang.default_dialogue: I've been knocked down my whole life. Getting back up is the only thing I'm good at.
Taebong Lim Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Cheongliang raised me. I fight like it.
Taebong Lim Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Stubborn Will — I'm still here, aren't I?

moves.name: Taebong Guard
moves.dialogue: Cheongliang taught me to take a beating.

Vin Jin Cheongliang.name: Vin Jin Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Streets
path.description: Cheongliang Streets — survival carved into every swing.

mastery.description: No mastery — just nerve and desperation.

unique_skill.name: Reckless Aggression
unique_skill.description: He throws himself in without thinking. Sometimes that's enough.

Vin Jin Cheongliang.default_dialogue: I don't fight smart. I fight hard.
Vin Jin Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Cheongliang made me reckless. And reckless wins sometimes.
Vin Jin Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Reckless Aggression — I'm coming at you no matter what.

moves.name: Slam
moves.dialogue: This is how we end it in Cheongliang.

moves.name: Vin Jin Guard
moves.dialogue: I've taken worse hits in the streets.

Hyungjae Lee Cheongliang.name: Hyungjae Lee Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Streets
path.description: Cheongliang Streets — every scar tells a story.

mastery.description: No mastery — built by experience, not training.

unique_skill.name: Quiet Grit
unique_skill.description: He doesn't say much. His fists do the talking.

Hyungjae Lee Cheongliang.default_dialogue: I don't need to be the best. I just need to outlast you.
Hyungjae Lee Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Quiet Grit — no speech. Just pressure.

moves.name: Punch
moves.crit_dialogue: More behind that than you thought!

moves.name: Slam
moves.dialogue: I put everything quiet into this one.
moves.miss_dialogue: The silence didn't help this time.

moves.name: Hyungjae Guard
moves.dialogue: I endure. That's what I do.

Jaewoo Park Cheongliang.name: Jaewoo Park Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Streets
path.description: Cheongliang Streets — you learn to fight or you learn to lose.

mastery.description: No mastery — street instincts only.

unique_skill.name: Corner Fighter
unique_skill.description: He fights best when his back is against the wall.

Jaewoo Park Cheongliang.default_dialogue: You back me into a corner — that's when I'm most dangerous.
Jaewoo Park Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Cheongliang Streets — the corner is home.
Jaewoo Park Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Corner Fighter — no retreat, no choice.

moves.name: Slam
moves.dialogue: When my back's against the wall — I slam.

Wooseok Choi Cheongliang.name: Wooseok Choi Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Streets
path.description: Cheongliang Streets — pride is all you've got sometimes.

mastery.description: No mastery — pride-fuelled fighting.

unique_skill.name: Pride Strike
unique_skill.description: He fights like he has something to prove. Every single time.

Wooseok Choi Cheongliang.default_dialogue: I have nothing but pride and I'll fight with every bit of it.
Wooseok Choi Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Cheongliang Streets — pride is the path.
Wooseok Choi Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Pride Strike — I refuse to look weak in front of anyone.

moves.name: Punch
moves.dialogue: My pride is in every hit.

moves.name: Kick
moves.dialogue: I won't be looked down on.

moves.name: Slam
moves.dialogue: This is what pride looks like.
moves.crit_dialogue: Every ounce of pride behind this slam!
moves.miss_dialogue: Pride hit the floor, not you.

moves.name: Wooseok Guard
moves.dialogue: I won't go down without a fight.

Kid Seonji Cheongliang.name: Kid Seonji Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Streets
path.description: Cheongliang Streets — too young, too stubborn to know when to stop.

mastery.description: No mastery — just a kid who refuses to back down.

unique_skill.name: Young Blood
unique_skill.description: He's got nothing to lose and everything to prove.

Kid Seonji Cheongliang.default_dialogue: Don't underestimate me because I'm young. That's your mistake.
Kid Seonji Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Cheongliang Streets — grew up too fast.
Kid Seonji Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Young Blood — I'm just getting started.

moves.name: Punch
moves.dialogue: I'll show you what a kid can do.

moves.name: Throw
moves.crit_dialogue: Throws with all his small weight!

moves.name: Slam
moves.dialogue: This is everything a kid from Cheongliang has.

Cheongliang Fam Cheongliang.name: Cheongliang Fam Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Brotherhood
path.description: Cheongliang Brotherhood — they move as one, they fall as one.

mastery.description: No individual mastery — their strength is the group.

unique_skill.name: Family Pressure
unique_skill.description: They don't fight for themselves. They fight for the family.

Cheongliang Fam Cheongliang.default_dialogue: You're not just fighting me. You're fighting all of Cheongliang.
Cheongliang Fam Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Cheongliang Brotherhood — the family stands together.
Cheongliang Fam Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Family Pressure — every member of the fam is watching.

Vin Jin Rage Cheongliang.name: Vin Jin Rage Cheongliang

path.name: Rage Unleashed
path.description: Rage Unleashed — when everything he's held back finally breaks free.

mastery.description: No mastery — pure uncontrolled rage.

unique_skill.name: Rage Mode
unique_skill.description: When he snaps — there's no stopping what comes next.

Vin Jin Rage Cheongliang.default_dialogue: You made me angry. You won't like what happens next.
Vin Jin Rage Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Rage Unleashed — I've been holding this back for too long.
Vin Jin Rage Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Rage Mode — I'm done holding back.

moves.name: Throw
moves.dialogue: I'll throw you like you're nothing.

moves.name: Slam
moves.dialogue: This is what rage looks like.

moves.name: Ssirium Style
moves.dialogue: I picked up something from watching Seonji.

moves.name: Rage Guard
moves.dialogue: I'm too angry to feel pain right now.

Goo Kim Cheongliang.name: Goo Kim Cheongliang

path.name: Sword Arts
path.description: Sword Arts — a blade that has ended more fights than anyone remembers.

mastery.description: Speed and Technique mastery — the sword only works if it's faster than the eye.

unique_skill.name: Goo Kim's Blade
unique_skill.description: He doesn't just use a sword. He IS the sword.

Goo Kim Cheongliang.default_dialogue: A sword in the hands of someone like me is not a weapon. It's a verdict.
Goo Kim Cheongliang.unique_path_dialogue: Sword Arts — the blade decides everything.
Goo Kim Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Goo Kim's Blade — I am the sharpest thing in this room.

moves.name: Heavy Blow
moves.dialogue: The weight of the blade behind this one.
moves.miss_dialogue: You stepped back just in time.

moves.name: Consecutive Slashes
moves.dialogue: One. Two. Three. Count them if you can.

moves.name: Sword Dance
moves.dialogue: The blade moves like it has a mind of its own.
moves.crit_dialogue: The sword dance lands every strike!
moves.miss_dialogue: You found a gap in the pattern.

moves.name: Vital Stroke
moves.crit_dialogue: Vital Stroke — the blade finds the only place that matters!
moves.miss_dialogue: You moved at the last possible moment.

moves.name: Blade Guard
moves.dialogue: The sword is shield and blade both.

Jinyong Go Cheongliang.name: Jinyong Go Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Striker
path.description: Cheongliang Striker — every hit placed with clear intent.

mastery.description: No mastery — disciplined street striking.

unique_skill.name: Pressure Points
unique_skill.description: He knows where it hurts. And he aims there every time.

Jinyong Go Cheongliang.default_dialogue: I don't fight loud. I fight precise.
Jinyong Go Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Pressure Points — I know exactly where to hit.

moves.name: Knee Strike
moves.dialogue: In the clinch — this is mine.

moves.name: Neck Strike
moves.miss_dialogue: You tilted your head just enough.

moves.name: Heavy Punch
moves.crit_dialogue: Heavy and exact — the perfect punch!
moves.miss_dialogue: You slipped at the last second.

moves.name: Jinyong Guard
moves.dialogue: I block what I see coming.

Doksu Heo Cheongliang.name: Doksu Heo Cheongliang

path.name: Cheongliang Striker
path.description: Cheongliang Striker — relentless pressure, same as Jinyong but with heavier intent.

mastery.description: No mastery — raw aggression with structure.

unique_skill.name: Heavy Pressure
unique_skill.description: He doesn't stop coming. Every hit says he's not done.

Doksu Heo Cheongliang.default_dialogue: I don't need to be clever. I just need to be relentless.
Doksu Heo Cheongliang.unique_skill_dialogue: Heavy Pressure — I push until you break.

moves.name: Kick
moves.miss_dialogue: You lifted your leg in time.

moves.name: Elbow Strike
moves.dialogue: Up close — this is where I live.

moves.name: Knee Strike
moves.miss_dialogue: You sprawled out of the clinch.

moves.name: Tackle
moves.crit_dialogue: Drives you straight into the ground!

moves.name: Heavy Punch
moves.dialogue: This is all the pressure in one hit.

moves.name: Doksu Guard
moves.dialogue: I take hits and keep walking.
